name: Shriners Children’s 500
comments: Christopher Bell won the Shriners Children's 500 at Phoenix  Raceway, his seventh NASCAR Cup Series victory.Prior to the start the following car dropped to the rear of the field under penalty for the reason indicated: #4(unapproved adjustments).
